cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Anthony could have gone to the bookstore. Let me start by listing out all the information given. First, Anthony woke up at 7am. Then, David saw him working at the office from 7am to 8am. So, between 7 and 8 AM, Anthony was at the office. Next, Leslie saw Anthony getting coffee at the cafe from 8am to 11am. That means from 8 AM to 11 AM, he was at the cafe. Then, Sarah saw him at the theater from 1pm to 9pm. The bookstore is closed after 9pm, so Anthony must have gone there before that. Now, I need to find the time slot when Anthony wasn't doing any of these activities. Let's break down the timeline: - 7am to 8am: At office (David) - 8am to 11am: At cafe (Leslie) - 1pm to 9pm: At theater (Sarah) The gaps between these times are when Anthony might have gone to the bookstore. The first gap is after he wakes up at 7am but before David sees him at the office. But Anthony woke up at 7am, and David saw him working from 7am onwards. So there's no gap there. The next possible gap is after Leslie sees him at the cafe (8am to 11am). So after 11am, until when? The next activity is at 1pm. So from 11am to 1pm, Anthony isn't accounted for. Then, after the theater closes at 9pm, the bookstore is closed too, so he can't go after that. Therefore, the possible time Anthony could have gone to the bookstore is between 11am and 1pm.
